data.title: Write RED structural boundary test for Playwright AC injection in brainstorm SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description
Write a failing structural boundary test (tests/skills/test-brainstorm-playwright-ac.sh) that asserts the following elements exist in plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md after 459e-62a8 is implemented:

1. Navigable vs non-navigable URL classification logic (distinguishing browser-accessible paths from API-only, webhook, middleware-internal paths)
2. Stack-awareness check: Playwright is only injected when the project has a web frontend (detected via commands.test_e2e in workflow-config.yaml OR @playwright/test in package.json)
3. Playwright assertion AC template for navigable overlaps: includes navigation action and assertion on at least one URL in the overlap zone
4. Standard integration AC path for non-navigable overlaps (falls through to 3-field format from 2629-66cb)
5. Non-web-stack fallback: all URL overlaps produce standard integration ACs when Playwright is unavailable

Also update .test-index:
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md -> tests/skills/test-brainstorm-playwright-ac.sh

Testing mode: RED (test must fail before Task 2 is implemented)

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-brainstorm-playwright-ac.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (UPDATE)
